creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/building-products/article.html

The project makes it easy to mirror its CVS repository using CVSup. Having the complete history of the source is useful when debugging complex problems and offers valuable insight into the intentions of the original developers. ...

If nobody gets to this I hope to have a look in a week or two.
